identity.mission: Create a unique, professional, and student-centric internship platform that blends 'The Performance Pro' efficiency with 'Organic' growth vibes.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix LinkedIn professionalism with Dribbble creativity.
Emotion First: Empower students, reduce anxiety.
Content is King: Listings and stats must pop.
Zoom In: Focus on match scores and skills.
Negative Space: Use whitespace to reduce cognitive load.

layout.structure: Sidebar Navigation (Left) + Topbar (Mobile) + Main Content Area
layout.grid_system: Bento Grid Mode B (High Density for Dashboard)

cards.style: rounded-xl border border-border bg-card text-card-foreground shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200

inputs.style: rounded-md border border-input bg-transparent px-3 py-2 text-sm shadow-sm transition-colors file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

badges.style: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2

hero.alt: Student working on laptop in cafe
Person using laptop on wooden table

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure primary text on primary background is white. Ensure muted text is slate-500 or darker.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install 'framer-motion' if specific complex animations are needed, otherwise use 'tailwindcss-animate'.
Use 'Manrope' for all headings to give a modern, tech-forward feel.
Implement the Dashboard using the 'Bento Grid Mode B' strategy: dense, data-rich, but with breathing room.
The 'Match Score' badge is a critical UI element. Make it distinct using the color coding defined in 'badges'.
For the Sidebar, ensure it collapses on mobile and uses a sheet/drawer component.
Authentication pages should be clean, centered, and trust-inspiring (use the 'subtle_blue' gradient background).
Internship cards should highlight: Role, Company, Location, Match Score, and a 'Quick Apply' button.
Use 'sonner' for all toast notifications (success/error states).
Ensure all interactive elements have 'data-testid' attributes for testing.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES: Avoid generic 'AI slop' designs. No center-aligned text heavy layouts.
Use 2-3x more padding than standard Tailwind defaults for a 'premium' feel.
Every interaction needs a micro-state (hover, active, focus).
Do not use dark gradients. Use subtle, light, airy gradients for backgrounds.
Use 'lucide-react' for icons. Do not use emojis in UI.
